questions.question: What is the primary difference between a combinational circuit and a sequential circuit?
options: B) Combinational circuits do not use memory
D) Sequential circuits do not use memory
questions.explanation: Combinational circuits do not use memory, whereas sequential circuits do.

questions.question: Which of the following is a type of combinational circuit used for logical operations?
questions.explanation: Combinational logic circuit is the correct term for a type of combinational circuit used for logical operations.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a decoder in digital design?
options: C) To select one of several options
questions.explanation: A decoder is used to select one of several options.

questions.question: Which of the following is a type of combinational circuit used for encoding binary data?
questions.explanation: An encoder is a type of combinational circuit used for encoding binary data.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a multiplexer in digital design?
options: A) To select one of several options
questions.explanation: A multiplexer is used to select one of several options.
